title: Pauper's Ladder - 2nd Edition - an unboxing of my favorite adventure game
body:
In this video, Daniel unboxes the second edition of Pauper’s Ladder, his favorite adventure game, and dives into what makes it such a joyful and whimsical experience. With new features, expanded solo modes, and the introduction of survival mode, Pauper’s Ladder continues to offer a delightful mix of exploration, crafting, and creature encounters. Daniel walks through the game’s components, from beautifully crafted meeples to new recipe cards and a refined rulebook.

If you love charming, detailed worlds with surprises around every corner, this unboxing gives you a great peek into why Pauper’s Ladder stands out as a unique passion project. Check it out to explore a game that’s truly joy in a box!
